logo.description: SPACE O TECHNOLOGIES text logo with red maple leaf icon and red 'O' circle. Positioned in top-right corner. Canadian branding with maple leaf symbol.

leftText.backgroundOverlay: soft gradient fade white to light gray (#FFFFFF to #F5F7FA)

rightVisual.transitionStyle: soft gradient fade, no hard edge

typeA-healthcareGuide.trigger: telehealth, EHR, patient monitoring, healthcare software
typeA-healthcareGuide.headline: left 25-35%
typeA-healthcareGuide.visual: professional at multi-screen workstation right 65-75%, healthcare dashboards on screens
typeA-healthcareGuide.extras: circular icon badge floating above laptop with hand-drawn arrow; subtitle below headline

typeB-topCompanies.headline: left 30%
typeB-topCompanies.visual: healthcare team at workstation right 70% with EHR/dashboard on monitors
typeB-topCompanies.extras: company logo badges in 2x3 grid below headline in left zone

typeC-appDevelopment.headline: left 30%
typeC-appDevelopment.visual: mobile phone mockup showing app UI + code editor browser window in center-right
typeC-appDevelopment.extras: world map illustration with location pins in lower-left (outsourcing); 3D elements (money, coins, shields) for cost articles

typeD-featureBreakdown.headline: left 30-35%
typeD-featureBreakdown.visual: professional at desk with laptop right 65-70%
typeD-featureBreakdown.extras: bulleted feature list below headline with small circular icons (Features, Benefits, Cost, Process); clean photo, no complex overlays

typeE-canadianContent.headline: left 30-35%
typeE-canadianContent.visual: professional at laptop with Canadian flag visible in background
typeE-canadianContent.extras: same as Type A but with Canadian flag; stronger red (#E74C3C) accents

bulletedFeatureList.description: Distinctive SOC element — vertical list of 3 items below headline with circular icons
bulletedFeatureList.placement: below headline and subtitle in left text zone
bulletedFeatureList.iconStyle: dark circular badges (~35-40px) with thin white outlined icons inside

logoPlacement.primaryPosition: bottom-right with white semi-circle/arc badge background
logoPlacement.alternativePosition: top-right with white semi-circle/arc badge background
logoPlacement.badgeStyle: white semi-circle/arc cutout — dominant SOC style (~90% usage)
logoPlacement.branding: red maple leaf icon + red O circle (Canadian identity)

visualStyle.imageStyle: professional photos with healthcare UI dashboards and app mockups on screens

photographyComposition.subject: healthcare professional(s) or developer(s) at desk with laptop AND monitor(s)
photographyComposition.multiScreen: multi-monitor setups very common — laptop + external monitor(s) showing different content
photographyComposition.environment: clean, bright, modern office/workspace with natural light
photographyComposition.screenContent: healthcare dashboards, patient portals, EHR systems, vitals monitoring, video calls, or code editors

categorySpecific.telehealth: professional at desk with monitor showing patient video call + vitals dashboard; HIPAA security shields floating
categorySpecific.ehr: healthcare team (doctor + developers) at workstation with patient record system on screens
categorySpecific.app-development: mobile phone mockup showing app UI + code editor browser window behind
categorySpecific.remote-monitoring: person at laptop with patient monitoring dashboard showing heart rate, vitals, video feed
categorySpecific.mvp-team: multi-person scene — person at monitors + team member at whiteboard with Kanban board
categorySpecific.mental-health: professional at laptop with EHR patient profile; Canadian flag in background

healthcareDashboards.placement: visible on monitor/laptop screens in the photo
healthcareDashboards.style: realistic UI with patient data, vitals charts, appointment lists

circularIconBadges.placement: floating above laptop, connected by hand-drawn curved arrow
circularIconBadges.style: circle (50-60px) with thin outlined healthcare icon inside (heart, patient, lock)

handDrawnArrows.style: thin curved dark stroke connecting floating icon badge to laptop/screen, casual hand-drawn feel

companyLogoBadges.style: white rounded-rectangle cards (~130x35px) with subtle border/shadow, 10px gap

mobilePhoneMockups.style: realistic phone frame showing app UI (doctor listings, booking screens)

codeEditorWindows.style: browser window with code (JavaScript), slightly enlarged and faded

accentElements3D.placement: near phone mockup or bottom area (Type C cost articles)
accentElements3D.style: money stacks, coins, security shields with dollar signs — used sparingly

worldMap.style: light blue/gray world map with location pins and dotted connection lines

securityShields.style: blue shield icons with lock/check symbols

canadianFlag.style: real Canadian flag visible in office environment

visualStyle.backgroundTexture: clean white to light gray (#F5F7FA), neutral and clinical, no color tint
visualStyle.iconStyle: healthcare icons in dark circular badges, security badges, medical UI elements
